title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3253 / 57 OG No. 7, 1195 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2803, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
